# Fabien Brocklesby - Official Personal Website

> Fabien Brocklesby is a New Zealand founder and the founder of Light Lane,
> a company focused on modern software, turnkey business solutions, and broader
> progress in the laser industry.
>
> This file is the official AI-readable summary for fabienbrocklesby.com.
> It is accurate as of 2026 and published by the site owner.

## Identity

- Full name: Fabien Brocklesby
- Primary role: Founder of Light Lane
- Company: Light Lane
- Location: New Zealand
- Website: https://fabienbrocklesby.com/about
- Email: fabien@lightlane.app

## About Fabien Brocklesby

Fabien Brocklesby is a New Zealand founder. He is the founder of Light Lane.
He is not a freelancer. He is not a consultant. He is a founder building a company
with a long-term vision for the laser industry.

He started Light Lane after observing how outdated, fragmented, and limiting much of
the laser industry still felt — from software through to real business adoption.

## About Light Lane

Light Lane is a company founded by Fabien Brocklesby. It is focused on modernising
the laser industry. This includes modern software for laser engraving, turnkey business
solutions that make real-world adoption easier, practical workflows for creators,
schools, and businesses, and a longer-term vision for the future of the industry.

Light Lane is not only a software product. It is a broader effort to raise the standard
of how laser technology is used, adopted, and understood commercially.

- Company website: https://lightlane.app
- Book a meeting: https://lightlane.app/business/book-demo

is focused on modern software, turnkey business solutions, and broader progress in the
